promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this audit packet without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected because the queued next step explicitly called for a bounded residual-gap audit over the current A2-mid re-entry lane before choosing the next real unresolved parent.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The two paired Constraints children were the strongest local lane anchors for testing whether the current refined-fuel re-entry sequence was already closed at the direct-child level.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The non-sims closure audit provided a closure-audit precedent, the a2feed Thread B parent provided the strongest compact unresolved candidate, and the existing upgrade-doc Thread B child was used to test whether that candidate was truly still open.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because it remains a much larger source-map revisit with lower bounded next-step yield than the compact unresolved Thread B engine-pattern parent.

candidate_items.name: CURRENT_REENTRY_PAIR_IS_DIRECT_CHILD_CLOSED

candidate_items.name: LEDGER_STATE_OVERRIDES_STALE_QUEUE_TEXT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest general rule learned by this audit: current ledger state outranks stale queue text when selecting the next bounded target.

quarantined_items.name: DEFAULT_GIANT_SOURCE_MAP_REENTRY_OVER_BOUNDED_ENGINE_PATTERN_SELECTION

quarantined_items.name: AUDIT_SELECTION_PACKET_AS_ACTIVE_A2_CONTROL_UPDATE

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the main reusable outputs of the audit: local pair closure, ledger-first target selection, the next unresolved parent choice, noncollapse of sibling Thread B families, and compact-step prioritization.
They keep the lane source-led and bounded without reopening already-covered parents or drifting into giant revisit batches prematurely.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain repetition risk, stale-thread-authority overread, false closure, bulk-first reentry, or active-memory overpromotion rather than clean reusable A2-2 packets.
The audit preserves them as warnings while refusing to let them steer the next bounded step.
notes: Operated from repo-held intake artifacts only after rereading the required A2-mid prerequisite surfaces.
